pull.title: ci: Fix exiting from ci.sh on error
pull.body:
Fixes the following bash error when make fails:
    ./ci/ci.sh: line 100: return: can only `return' from a function or
    sourced script

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1
